prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 2.5L Smartstream G2.5 T-GDi (G4KM) turbocharged inline-4 with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger, paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe featuring a 100-cell catalytic converter from Milltek Sport for optimized exhaust flow and reduced backpressure.

Fuel System: Upgrade to a set of Bosch Motorsport 1050cc high-impedance injectors, coupled with a Syvecs S8 ECU for precise fuel mapping and ignition timing control, supporting up to 450 horsepower on E85 fuel blend.

Suspension: Install a full KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilover kit, specifically designed for the Sorento's U3 platform, with adjustable camber plates and spherical bearing top mounts for track-focused alignment adjustments.
estetica: Aero: Fit a Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit for the Sorento GT-Line, including carbon fiber front and rear fender flares, side skirts, and a rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3-piece carbon fiber rear wing from APR Performance (model: SW-2100).
Wheels: Mount a set of WORK Emotion CR Kiwami 20x10.5 ET+15 wheels in a matte bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35 R20) for maximum grip and aggressive stance.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with Recaro Pole Position SP-G bucket seats in Alcantara and carbon fiber, paired with a custom roll cage from Custom Cages UK (FIA-spec, bolt-in design) and a MOMO Mod.77 steering wheel with a quick-release hub.
